news.t: A Roundup of June's Most Notable ETF Launches
Kurv Launches SpaceX Enhanced Income ETF
Kurv Launches the XSHP ETF, Designed to Provide SpaceX Exposure With Monthly Income Potential

holdings.infoBox: XSHP is an equity ETF with a total of 11 individual holdings. The top holdings are United States Treasury Bills 0% stock at 68.17%, United States Treasury Bills 0% at 64.52%, Cash Offset at 13.94%, Spcx 07/17/2026 215 C at 10.01%, and Fidelity Government Portfolio at 3.25%.

overview.description: The Kurv SpaceX Enhanced Income ETF (XSHP) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in communication services equity. The fund invests in Space Exploration Technologies Corp. (Ticker: SPCX) or SpaceX through stocks and/or derivative instruments on SPCX XSHP was launched on Jun 17, 2026 and is issued by Kurv.

data.title: Kurv Launches SpaceX Enhanced Income ETF
data.text: On June 17, Kurv Investment Management launched the Kurv SpaceX Enhanced Income ETF (XSHP), on Cboe. With an expense ratio of 99 basis points, the fund seeks to provide current monthly income through ...
